head.title: Appendix J: Standard on Systems that Manage Information and Data

div.h1: Appendix J: Standard on Systems that Manage Information and Data

section.h2: Appendix J. Standard on Systems that Manage Information and Data

ul.li: J.1.1This standard takes effect on May 4, 2022.

J.1.2This standard applies to all systems; however,
J.1.2.1Existing systems, developed or procured before May 4, 2022, will have 24 months to be fully transitioned to the requirements in this standard; or
J.1.2.2For systems recognized as “legacy”, departments will have 24 months from the effective date to establish a plan to meet the requirements in this standard.

J.2.1This standard provides details in support of section 4.4.8 of the Policy on Service and Digital and sections 4.3.18 and 4.4 of the Directive on Service and Digital and replaces the Standard for Electronic Documents and Records Management Solutions (EDRMS) dated (June 1, 2010).
